description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs: a test job in the test stage that uses the default Docker image and a postgres:alpine service, sets POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables, and runs export DATABASE_URL=postgres://$POSTGRES_USER:$POSTGRES_PASSWORD@postgres:5432/$POSTGRES_DB, apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python-dev python-pip, pip install -r requirements.txt, and python manage.py test. Add a staging deploy job that runs in the deploy stage, executes apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-dev, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_STAGING_APP --api-key=$HEROKU_STAGING_API_KEY --skip-cleanup, and is limited to the master branch. Add a production deploy job that also runs in the deploy stage, runs the same commands but with $HEROKU_PRODUCTION_APP and $HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY, and is limited to tag pipelines. No caches or artifacts are defined.
